title: Tokenized Stocks Could Open $5 Trillion Crypto Market, Exec Says
summary: Carlos Domingo, CEO of Securitize, believes bringing stocks and ETFs onto blockchain could unlock a massive $5 trillion market. Currently, tokenized assets are only around $30 billion.
body:
At ETHConf, Carlos Domingo, CEO of Securitize, argued that tokenizing traditional stocks and exchange-traded funds (ETFs) could unlock a $5 trillion market. This move would bring mainstream financial assets onto the blockchain, potentially revolutionizing how they are traded and managed.

Domingo highlighted that the current tokenized asset sector is only about $30 billion, a fraction of the potential market. He believes that by tokenizing stocks and ETFs, the crypto industry could attract a much larger audience, including traditional investors who are already familiar with these assets.

For everyday people, this could mean easier access to a wider range of investments. Tokenized stocks and ETFs could offer lower fees, faster settlements, and greater transparency compared to traditional markets. This could democratize investing, making it more accessible to a global audience.

The next step will be watching for regulatory approvals and the rollout of these tokenized products. Investors should keep an eye on announcements from major financial institutions and regulatory bodies, as these will be key indicators of when this market could take off.
twitterThread: What if you could trade stocks and ETFs on the blockchain? Carlos Domingo, CEO of Securitize, says this could unlock a $5 trillion crypto market.
Right now, tokenized assets are only $30 billion. Bringing traditional stocks and ETFs onchain could attract a much larger audience, including traditional investors.

Keep an eye on regulatory approvals and announcements from major financial institutions. This could be a game-changer for investing. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-09-tokenized-stocks-could-open-5-trillion-crypto-market-exec-says
standaloneTweet: Tokenizing stocks and ETFs could unlock a $5 trillion crypto market, says Securitize CEO Carlos Domingo. This could make investing more accessible and transparent.
